prompt: Create a repeating to-do called 'Write the year-end charity letters' that comes up every year on the last Sunday of December.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Write the year-end charity letters' AND start=2 AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fu</key><integer>4</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>mo</key><integer>11</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>wd</key><integer>0</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>wdo</key><integer>-1</integer>%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask i JOIN TMTask t ON i.rt1_repeatingTemplate=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Write the year-end charity letters' AND i.rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND i.status=0

pseudoScript: things todo add "Write the year-end charity letters" --json

things todo make-repeating "$(things search "Write the year-end charity letters" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --frequency yearly --interval 1 --yearly-month 12 --on-weekday sunday --on-ordinal last --dangerously-drive-gui
